summary: PRED-105 (46° copper coils → +15% cucumber growth, 14d window, closes 2026-04-18) assessed as pending with low testability. Findings file contains (a) a full suggested entry for the decider to add to data/predictions.json and (b) the our_verdict=pending assessment. Key finding: the prediction's stated derivation is internally inconsistent — sin θ = H₀/R_eq arithmetically yields 25.25°, not the claimed 46° (which is 2·arctan(H₀/R_eq) = 46.20°). Protocol also lacks N, randomization, blinding, and pre-registered stats. The window closes 2026-04-18 so this is time-sensitive; after closure the poller will detect and the decider should re-assign for verdict update.
